name: ask-pro
description: Codex plugin bundle for packaging ask-pro prompts and checking external advice sessions.

interface.title: Ask Pro
interface.shortDescription: Capture explicit ask-pro prompts for external advice workflows
interface.description: Adds a UserPromptSubmit hook that activates only on current ask pro commands and injects ask-pro mode context without running runtime automation from the hook.
interface.longDescription: Ask Pro is a distributable Codex plugin bundle for explicit ask-pro CLI workflows. Its hook recognizes current prompt commands such as ask pro diagnose this or ask pro check <session-id>, then provides structured context for later skills and scripts.
